results.title: Apple Competitors: How AAPL Stacks Up Against the Tech Industry | The Motley Fool
The Intelligence Supercycle: A Deep Dive into Apple's (AAPL) 2026 Transformation
Apple stock slides in 2026 as AI strategy lags behind competitors

summary: Apple topped Samsung in smartphone shipments for first time in 14 years (2025). Google Gemini 3 outperforming Apple AI; Apple announced partnership to use Gemini to power Siri. Microsoft embedding AI broadly. Apple stock had slid 5% YTD before Q2 earnings beat on AI lag concerns. CEO transition to Ternus Sept 1, 2026.
